# BarcodeFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable BarcodeFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/barcodefyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://barcodefyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.barcodefyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/barcodefyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/barcodefyi-embed
- API: https://barcodefyi.com/developers/

## Tag FYI Widget Family

- [QRCodeFYI Widget](https://widget.qrcodefyi.com)
- [NFCFYI Widget](https://widget.nfcfyi.com)
- [BLEFYI Widget](https://widget.blefyi.com)
- [RFIDFYI Widget](https://widget.rfidfyi.com)
- [SmartCardFYI Widget](https://widget.smartcardfyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
